final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing cinematic still mockup of a TikTok (Douyin) live-stream screenshot featuring a young woman resembling a celestial beauty ("神仙姐姐").

Style/medium: screenshot UI mockup, live-stream interface
Composition: portrait, 9:16 vertical framing, subject holding a sign toward camera
Subject: 神仙姐姐 — a strikingly beautiful young woman, holding a handwritten sign with both hands
Scene/backdrop: indoor live-stream setting
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"
Constraints: the sign must display the exact text "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"; include typical Douyin live-stream UI overlay elements (viewer count, comment bar, like icons, username)
Avoid:
